◎简　　介  

　　For Edward ‘Teddy’ Brown, the end of summer heralds the end of an era. In a desperate bid to hold onto his childhood dreams, Teddy leads his two best mates and their D-grade cricket club to India, where they lose as many matches as they win friends.
